body.text: The lone pending 2A case is decided — and it's a win.

SCOTUS struck Hawaii's "carry only with consent" default 6–3, with ripple effects in CA, MD, NY and NJ. The same week, Virginia's "assault firearms" ban was blocked statewide through Dec. 31 — while the state's universal-background-check mandate is set to return July 1.

facts.title: 1. Wolford v. Lopez decided 6–3 (Hawaii carry struck)

body.text:
• Wolford v. Lopez decided 6–3 — Hawaii private-property carry default struck (Alito)
• VA assault-firearms ban blocked statewide through Dec. 31 (Crump v. Katz)
• VA universal background checks return July 1 (Wilson v. Katz); GOF vows appeal
• SCOTUS 2A cert cluster — orders expected Mon Jun 29; DOJ–CA deadline T-4 (Jun 30)
